requiredBehaviors.behavior: AgenC exposes a context-collapse probe surface that is safe to import while the collapse engine is absent from the runtime build.
edgeCases: TUI token warnings can probe the service without importing the upstream mirror context-collapse index

intentionalReductions: The source snapshot only exposes the disabled context-collapse probe surface, so S-02 does not port the older mirror's collapse engine internals.
S-02 does not move context-collapse persistence helpers; callers that restore historical collapse metadata remain on their existing path until that behavior is separately owned.
